script:
set +e
echo '=== current state right now ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/aixa/.claude /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== try su (not sudo) to read file ==='
su -s /bin/bash aixa -c 'stat /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json; echo ---; head -c 60 /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json' 2>&1 | head -10
echo '=== try runuser ==='
runuser -u aixa -- stat /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1 | head -8
echo '=== recreate the file as aixa via install ==='
DST=/home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json
cp -a "$DST" "${DST}.preserve" 2>&1
install -m 600 -o aixa -g aixa "${DST}.preserve" "${DST}" 2>&1
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' "$DST" 2>&1
rm -f "${DST}.preserve"
echo '=== verify aixa can read now ==='
runuser -u aixa -- head -c 60 "$DST" 2>&1
echo
echo '=== test claude as aixa ==='
runuser -u aixa -- bash -c 'echo hi | timeout 30 /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -10
echo '===END==='
